text:
/ci3 2 ええい、せっかく海に来たってのに！
悪いけど、倒すの手伝ってくれる？

/ci2 2 /mn16 よし、これで海を楽しめるわね！
手伝ってくれてありがとう！

/mn5 そんな……
手伝ってもらったのに、ごめん。

/mn4 油断した……
こんなに強いなんて……！

/mn22 コオリ、突っ込みすぎよ！
カタキはとってあげるから

/ci3 2 Awww, and we finally made it to the beach!
Hate to be a bother, but could you help us?

/ci2 2 /mn16 Yes! Now we can enjoy the beach! Thanks
for helping!

/mn5 What the... Sorry, looks like your efforts
were wasted...
/mn4 Got careless... Didn't think they'd be that strong!

/mn22 Kohri, you charged too far ahead! Don't worry,
I got yours!
